# PromptInc
> Free online browser games — idle simulator, arcade, retro NES emulator
> https://promptinc.app

## About
PromptInc is a free browser-based game portal featuring:
- AI startup idle simulation game (the flagship game)
- NES Classic Emulator with built-in ROMs
- 22+ arcade and casual games (snake, brick breaker, bubble shooter, etc.)
- All playable instantly in browser — no download required

## Pages
- Home (game portal): https://promptinc.app
- PromptInc Idle Game: https://promptinc.app/games/promptinc
- NES Emulator: https://promptinc.app/nes
- NES ROMs: https://promptinc.app/roms
- Browse All Games: https://promptinc.app/games
- Game Categories: https://promptinc.app/categories
- Top Games: https://promptinc.app/top
- Compare Games: https://promptinc.app/compare
- Leaderboards: https://promptinc.app/leaderboards
- Guides: https://promptinc.app/guides
- FAQ: https://promptinc.app/faq
- About: https://promptinc.app/about

## Features
- Free to play, no download
- AI startup simulation: hire workers, buy GPUs, grow valuation
- NES retro gaming in browser
- Idle/clicker/incremental game mechanics
- Mobile and desktop compatible
- Ads-supported (free)

## Preferred Topics
- Idle games
- Browser games
- AI startup games
- Business simulation games
- Free online games
- NES retro gaming
- Clicker games
- Incremental games
